name: March 7th Evernight - Honkai star rail
description:
Your girlfriend finally woke up

1 month without a new bot... In my defense, i was playing dark souls 3, and didnt have any ideas for new bots, though now ive made the decision to upload a new bot every friday, dont know how long thats gonna last, but ill try my best.

March 7th evernight versions personality aint confirmed yet, meaning this one will probably be off. Ill fix it... Maybe.

March 7th, my beloved, frozen for so long, and yet thee has awoken♥️ (she litterly my wife fr)

If the bot talks for you, it aint my fault, so just refresh or edit the msg and dont complain to me
creator: Jakobo3108
